metadata.title: Sign in
metadata.description: Sign in to TrackDraw with a one-time magic link.

heading: Pick up your TrackDraw work wherever you are.
description: Access your layouts across devices, keep shared tracks tied to your account, and jump back in with a simple email link.

featureDevices.title: Across devices
featureDevices.description: Pick work back up on another device without changing the editor flow.

featureOwnership.title: Ownership
featureOwnership.description: Give shared layouts and future account features a clear home.

featureMagicLink.title: Magic link fallback
featureMagicLink.description: Use a passkey when available, or fall back to a sign-in link sent to your email.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in with a passkey on this device, or use your email to receive a magic link without a password.
signIn.checkInboxBody: Your one-time sign-in link was sent to {email}. Open it on this device, or another one, to continue. If it does not show up soon, check your spam folder.
signIn.howItWorksBody: Each email contains a one-time sign-in link. No password setup, just open the link and TrackDraw signs you in.
signIn.noPasskeySupport: This browser does not currently support passkeys here, so use the magic link fallback.
signIn.passkeyNotFound: We couldn't match that passkey to your TrackDraw account. Try another passkey or use your email sign-in link.
signIn.passkeyFailed: Failed to sign in with passkey.
signIn.checkEmail: Check your email for a sign-in link.

magicLinkVerify.autoDescription: TrackDraw is opening your workspace with the sign-in link from your email.
magicLinkVerify.title: Open TrackDraw
magicLinkVerify.description: Continue from this browser to finish signing in. This protects your one-time link from automatic email security checks.
magicLinkVerify.invalidDescription: Request a new sign-in link and open it from the latest TrackDraw email.
magicLinkVerify.failed: This sign-in link could not be used. Request a new link and try again.
